Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Build weighted tsvector documents from admitted safe text with language, provenance, refresh, and deletion policy.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Search Document model · Theory Feed Ts Search Do…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Raw publisher HTML produces the most accurate full-text index.
